task_completion.description: Draw a rectangle in the SolveSpace canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four connected line segments forming a closed rectangular shape in the main SolveSpace drawing area.

task_completion.description: Constrain the width of the rectangle to 80 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension constraint showing '80' or '80.00' applied to the horizontal lines of the rectangle.

task_completion.description: Constrain the height of the rectangle to 50 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dimension constraint showing '50' or '50.00' applied to the vertical lines of the rectangle.
The Save dialog showing 'rectangle.slvs' in the file name field, or the SolveSpace window title bar displaying 'rectangle.slvs'.

task_completion.description: Save the file in the /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/ directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Save dialog showing the current directory path as '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' while saving the file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SolveSpace GUI to create the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application open with active tool selections and drawing actions, not just terminal commands or text editors creating a .slvs file.

integrity.description: The dimensions are genuine SolveSpace constraints.
integrity.visual_evidence: The '80' and '50' values appear as native SolveSpace dimension constraints (typically magenta/purple text with leader lines), not as standalone text annotations.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal script to bypass the GUI drawing process.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows step-by-step drawing and constraining in the GUI rather than a single terminal command generating the final file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The rectangle must be drawn in SolveSpace. The width must be constrained to exactly 80mm and the height to exactly 50mm using the Distance/Diameter constraint tool. The file must be saved exactly as 'rectangle.slvs' in the '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/' directory.
